---
title: "RytyB.github.io"
---

## Ryan Boyce: Selected Works
These are some code-y and data-y projects that I've worked on and prettied up. Hope you enjoy!

## Projects

**[Marathon Training Analysis](https://RytyB.github.io/marathon_post-mortem)**
In 2025 I ran a marathon much slower than I would have liked to. Here's what the data told me.
